The '''Lenico Belt''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|belt]] that was located within the [[Lenico system/Legends|Lenico system]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The field contained the hidden [[Cairn Installation]], which played host to an [[Imperial Remnant]] operation that was active during the [[Empire Reborn]] campaign. The facility also served as a base for [[Galak Fyyar]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the ''[[Doomgiver]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
